---
applyTo: ".brain/**/*.md"
---

`.brain/` files are the canonical prep memory.

- Preserve history instead of rewriting it away unless the information is clearly obsolete.
- When a session changes the prep status, update the relevant trackers together instead of editing only one file.
- Keep `.brain/NextSteps.md` current whenever the immediate next study block, deadline, or resume point changes.
- Keep dates explicit and consistent with the current date.
- If the active exam or phase changes, make sure `.brain/Progress.md`, `.brain/ExamTracker.md`, and `.brain/StudyPlan.md` agree.
- If `.brain/NextSteps.md` changes because priorities moved, make sure `.brain/Progress.md` and `.brain/StudyPlan.md` still support the same next action.
- When adding weak areas, make them specific enough to be remediated with targeted practice.
- When adding mock logs, include score, topic breakdown when known, and a next-action note.
